blended.narrative: Monarch Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,202 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
